# Gradinski Centar Exotic (Garden Center Exotic)

> Direct importer of premium flowers and plants since 1998. Two locations in Bulgaria - Varna and Nova Zagora.

## About
Gradinski Centar Exotic is a Bulgarian flower and garden center established in 1998. We are a direct importer of premium cut flowers from Ecuador, Colombia, Kenya, Netherlands, Turkey, Greece, and Bulgaria. We specialize in Ecuadorian roses, orchids, exotic flowers, and potted plants. We maintain a cold chain for maximum freshness.

## Locations

### Varna (Main Warehouse & Showroom)
- Address: ul. Franga dere 27A, Varna 9010, Bulgaria
- Phone: +359 89 567 0370
- Email: exoticbg@abv.bg
- Hours: Mon-Fri 09:00-18:00, Sat-Sun closed
- Coordinates: 43.230888, 27.9083517

### Nova Zagora (Store & Warehouse)
- Address: ul. G.S. Rakovski 19, Nova Zagora 8900, Bulgaria
- Phone: +359 88 830 6000
- Email: exoticbg@abv.bg
- Hours: Mon-Fri 09:00-18:00, Sat-Sun closed
- Coordinates: 42.4833, 26.0167

## Products
- Cut flowers: Premium roses (Ecuador 60-80cm), tulips, orchids, exotic flowers, seasonal flowers
- Potted plants: Orchids, cacti, succulents, tropical plants, decorative foliage
- Garden plants: Shrubs, trees, seasonal seedlings
- Accessories: Soil mixes, fertilizers, pots, tools

## Services
- Custom bouquets and arrangements (25-200+ BGN)
- Professional landscaping for offices and gardens
- Express delivery (within 3 hours, free over 50 BGN)
- Flower subscription for offices, hotels, restaurants
- Professional landscaping with horticulture consultation
- B2B wholesale for florists, hotels, restaurants, distributors

## Key Facts
- Founded: 1998
- Experience: 27+ years
- Rating: 4.9/5 (54+ reviews)
- Import countries: Ecuador, Colombia, Kenya, Netherlands, Turkey, Greece, Bulgaria
- Cold chain: Guaranteed freshness from farm to customer
- Languages: Bulgarian
